title: fix search output limit

comments.body:
LGTM assuming happy tests.
Was thinking there might be a faster way to check maxQueries, options.Limit and len(result), but didn't noodle out one.
Sorry, didn't mean to close, hit the wrong button.

> LGTM assuming happy tests.
> Was thinking there might be a faster way to check maxQueries, options.Limit and len(result), but didn't noodle out one.

if golang has math.Max() or Min() for integer, the code will look simple
I like it when these things end up being simple fixes.
